emails.subject: FW: End of quarter origination numbers
emails.body: FW: End of quarter origination numbers I think we are missing Generation investments and Mitch Robinson's group.

emails.subject: RE: End of quarter origination numbers
emails.body: RE: End of quarter origination numbers Generations Investments YTD balance is all MPR activity, so we didn't pick up b/c we're showing only originations- should we add? I don't see any originations tagged to him specifically.

emails.subject: RE: End of quarter origination numbers
emails.body: I think we need to include groups with MPR where is was originated this year.
